name: hgp-exam-work-flow-and-chat-native
description: Native Android, iOS, macOS, and Windows wrappers for the HGPExamWorkFlowAndChat HTML5 client.
copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Harald Glab-Plhak. Licensed under the MIT License.

scripts.android:sync: npm run bundle:prod && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.ios:sync: npm run bundle:prod && npx cap sync ios
scripts.macos:build:silicon: npm run bundle:prod && npx tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin --bundles dmg
scripts.macos:build:intel: npm run bundle:prod && npx tauri build --target x86_64-apple-darwin --bundles dmg
scripts.macos:build:universal: npm run bundle:prod && npx tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles dmg
scripts.windows:dev: npm run bundle:prod && npx tauri dev
scripts.windows:build: npm run bundle:prod && npx tauri build
